38.reason: [This print statement inside insertnum causes premature and incorrect output during insertion, not just for leaf nodes and not in left-to-right order.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [This print statement inside insertnum causes premature and incorrect output during insertion, not just for leaf nodes and not in left-to-right order.]

61.reason: [The function call passes 'root' (initially NULL) by value, so modifications to 'p' inside insertnum do not update 'root' in main after the first insertion. This leads to an incomplete or broken tree.]
